headline: **MLB Daily Recap: May 16, 2026**
article:
The Colorado Rockies suffered a 7-2 loss to the Pittsburgh Pirates, led by Ryan O'Hearn's 3 hits, including a home run, and 2 RBIs. The Washington Nationals fell to a historic 15-1 defeat at the hands of the Cincinnati Reds, with JJ Bleday driving in 6 runs. The New York Mets secured a 9-4 victory over the Detroit Tigers, with Nolan McLean earning the win after pitching 7.0 innings with 7 strikeouts.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Matt Waldron (San Diego Padres) who has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right brachialis muscle injury. Other notable injured players include Blake Snell (Los Angeles Dodgers), Chase Dollander (Colorado Rockies), Cal Raleigh (Seattle Mariners), Jimmy Herget (Colorado Rockies), Brooks Kriske (Athletics), Robby Snelling (Miami Marlins), and Francisco Alvarez (New York Mets).

The Baltimore Orioles made a trade, acquiring RHP Eduarniel Núñez from the Athletics in exchange for cash. The Athletics also traded LHP José Suarez to the Seattle Mariners for cash. Other notable trades include the Los Angeles Dodgers trading OF Jose Requena to the Arizona Diamondbacks for CF Alek Thomas, and the San Francisco Giants trading C Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians for LHP Matt Wilkinson and other considerations.

top_news.title: **Rockies Fall to Pirates in 7-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies suffered a 7-2 defeat at the hands of the Pittsburgh Pirates. Ryan O'Hearn led the Rockies' offense with 3 hits, including a home run, and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Suffer Historic Loss to Reds**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals fell to a 15-1 defeat at the hands of the Cincinnati Reds, marking a lopsided victory for the home team. JJ Bleday led the Nationals' offense with a 3-hit, 2-home run performance, driving in 6 runs.

top_news.title: **Tigers Fall to Mets in 9-4 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The New York Mets secured a 9-4 victory over the Detroit Tigers, with Nolan McLean earning the win after pitching 7.0 innings with 7 strikeouts. Gage Workman led the Tigers' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Twins Rout Marlins 9-1**
top_news.summary: The Minnesota Twins dominated the Miami Marlins, winning 9-1 behind a strong outing from Zebby Matthews. Matthews pitched 7.0 innings, striking out 5 and allowing 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Padres Place Waldron on 15-Day IL**
top_news.summary: San Diego Padres right-hander Matt Waldron has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right brachialis muscle injury.

top_news.title: **Orioles Acquire Eduarniel Núñez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles have acquired RHP Eduarniel Núñez from the Athletics in exchange for cash.
